text: "A stater"... It is the same as a sicle or shekel.

"And of Josaphat."... That is, Josaphat 
being yet alive, who some time before his death made his son Joram king, as David had done before by his own son Solomon.
"Daughter"... That is, grand-daughter; for she was daughter of Achab son of Amri, ver. 18.
